name: Quiet parallel init verification commands
scope: Add init.sh command selection for install, lint, typecheck, test, build, and sync
Keep no-argument init.sh as full verification: install, harness check, parallel lint/typecheck/test jobs, sync, Done output
Run web and worker lint/typecheck/test jobs in the default full flow with quiet output by default
Run web Tailwind lint autofix as part of the web lint job for both lint and full flows
Use local package cache for install, ESLint cache for repeated lint runs, and Vitest cache for repeated test runs
Keep build out of the default full flow temporarily; run build only through the explicit build command
Print only failing job output on errors; print OK for successful single-command runs
Support --verbose to print captured execution logs

completed: Replaced sequential init.sh flow with command dispatcher
Added quiet command runner for install, harness, and sync
Added parallel job runner for web and worker verification tasks
Chained web Tailwind lint autofix after web lint autofix inside the web lint job
Added worker build check through wrangler deploy dry-run output
Added --verbose log printing and successful single-command OK output
Added pnpm install --prefer-offline, per-app ESLint cache files, and Vitest --cache flags for faster repeat verification
Temporarily removed build from the no-argument full flow while keeping ./init.sh build available
